file: tmp_【 3D LIVE 】ゲストもたくさん❕重大告知アリ❕みんなで楽しも🍙💜💜【 #猫又おかゆ生誕祭2026 】 [rYpbqdD1oiQ]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_004.mov

scenes.description: Nekomata Okayu performs 'Ai♡Sufuri~mu!' on a parade float with guests Himemori Luna and Tsunomaki Watame.
Nekomata Okayu performs 'Darling' (ダーリン) with guest Ninomae Ina'nis on a stage with a digital checkerboard floor.

subtitles.original: ねえねえねえ 気付いてマイダーリン それはあなた

subtitles.original: La la la...
subtitles.english: La la la...

subtitles.original: 魔法みたいな 夢みたいな ファンタジックな物語が
subtitles.english: Like magic, like a dream, a fantastic story

subtitles.original: 世界に感染 愉快に蔓延 待ってそんなの聞いてないってば
subtitles.english: Infecting the world, spreading joyfully—wait, I didn't hear about this!

subtitles.original: 根本的に痛い
subtitles.english: Fundamentally painful

subtitles.original: 異常鼓動支えてイカレた妄想量
subtitles.english: Supporting an abnormal pulse, a crazy amount of delusion

subtitles.original: 本能的に深い
subtitles.english: Instinctively deep

subtitles.original: 破壊衝動照らす確かな解像度
subtitles.english: The certain resolution illuminating the destructive impulse

subtitles.original: 恋の導火線 いざ火を灯し
subtitles.english: The fuse of love, lighting it now

subtitles.original: ひとつここらで本調子
subtitles.english: Getting into full swing right about here

subtitles.original: 脳細胞に今 叩き込め
subtitles.english: Now, hammer it into my brain cells

subtitles.original: 分からないことだらけを
subtitles.english: Full of things I don't understand

subtitles.original: あざとい際どい笑わないで
subtitles.english: Calculating and risky, please don't laugh

subtitles.original: いつもいつも誤魔化しては
subtitles.english: Always, always deceiving yourself

subtitles.original: 借りね いらない 知らない おだてないで
subtitles.english: A debt, I don't need it, I don't know it, don't flatter me

subtitles.original: 言えない消えない思い込め
subtitles.english: With feelings that can't be said or erased

subtitles.original: 愛の強制ミューティレーション
subtitles.english: Love's forced mutilation

subtitles.original: 魔法みたいな 夢みたいな ファンタジックな物語が
subtitles.english: Like magic, like a dream, a fantastic story

subtitles.original: 世界に感染 愉快に蔓延 待ってそんなの聞いてないダーリン
subtitles.english: Infecting the world, spreading joyfully—wait, I didn't hear about this, darling

subtitles.original: ベタな恋愛 エラな展開 だってそれじゃつまらないでしょ
subtitles.english: A cliché romance, a bizarre turn of events—because that would be boring, wouldn't it?

subtitles.original: 切り抜けて 引き付けて 愛の画面ストレート
subtitles.english: Cutting through, drawing them in, love's screen straight

subtitles.original: 根本的にまずい 異常鼓動支えてイカレた情報量
subtitles.english: Fundamentally bad—supporting an abnormal pulse, a crazy amount of information

subtitles.original: 圧倒的に淡い 母性本能暴く飢えた奴隷根性
subtitles.english: Overwhelmingly faint—exposing maternal instinct, a starving slave mentality

subtitles.original: 恋の導火線 いざ火を付けて 頭の中はアルデンテ
subtitles.english: The fuse of love, lighting it now—my head is al dente

subtitles.original: 生細胞に今 流し込め 抗いがたいことだらけを
subtitles.english: Now, pour it into the living cells—all the things that are hard to resist

subtitles.original: 冷たい触れ合い遊ばないで
subtitles.english: A cold interaction, don't play around

subtitles.original: いつもいつも当てつけては
subtitles.english: Always, always being spiteful

subtitles.original: 借りね 拙い 伺い ふざけないで
subtitles.english: A debt, clumsy, an inquiry—don't mess with me

subtitles.original: 言えない消えない思い込め 愛の完結アイスピック
subtitles.english: With feelings that can't be said or erased, love's conclusion: an ice pick

subtitles.original: 好きな人の好きな人ってだけで嫌い
subtitles.english: I hate you just because you're the person my crush likes

subtitles.original: 都合の良い子 エディテイション 終わりたくないんだよ
subtitles.english: A convenient girl, 'Edit-ation'—I don't want it to end

subtitles.original: 狂った未来に迎合 終わった抵抗 いっそこのまま目塞いで
subtitles.english: Catering to a crazy future, resistance is over—might as well keep my eyes closed

subtitles.original: 切って爽快 喰らって崩壊 知って後快 望んだ将来
subtitles.english: Cutting is refreshing, eating is collapsing, knowing is regret—the future I wanted

subtitles.original: 手を繋いで 場を繋いで ファンタジックなすったもんだが
subtitles.english: Holding hands, keeping the flow, a fantastic fuss...

subtitles.original: 脳に感染 危険に発展 待ってこんな...
subtitles.english: Infecting the brain, developing into danger—wait, this kind of...
